sections.label: Verse 1
lines: I bukna suangpi Topa hi, Huihpi nun ciang a kidalna;
A sia namkim a’ ding bit hi, Huihpi

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Gimna gam sungah Jesuh Suangpi a hi!
Gimna gam sungah Jesuh Suangpi a hi,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sunin ni lim, zan in kulh pi, Huihpi nun ciang a kidal na;
om nawn lo hi, Huihpi nun ciang a kidal na.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Huihpi’n i kiimkot nuai hang in, Huihpi
Nusia lo ding cik mah hun in, Huihpi nun ciang a kidalna.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Suangpi, belh ding it huai, Huihpi nun ciang a kidalna;
Tawntung hong nai, hong kem, hong huai, Huihpi
